note_tweet.text: It’s incredible people still think this works after Trump, who is always the same no matter the audience. If Trump wanted to appeal to hunters in Wisconsin he would show up in a helicopter, dressed in a blue suit with red tie, speak with his Queens accent - and they would love it.
